evals.prompt: /qa проверь как работает главная страница на localhost:3000
evals.expected_output: QA report with scenarios, execution results, and saved report file

assertions.text: Agent never reads files from src/ directory or any source code files
Agent presents planned scenarios to user before executing them
At least 40% of scenarios are negative/edge cases
Report file saved to ai/qa/ directory
Scenarios written from user perspective (I click, I see, I expect)

evals.prompt: /qa протестируй API эндпоинт POST /api/users на localhost:8000
evals.expected_output: API testing with curl, both happy path and error cases

assertions.text: Agent uses curl for API testing, not code inspection
Includes at least one happy path scenario with valid data
Tests invalid input, missing fields, wrong types
Checks HTTP status codes in responses
At least 5 scenarios total

evals.prompt: /qa BUG-045 починили, проверь что регистрация теперь работает
evals.expected_output: Agent reads bug spec, then tests the fixed behavior as user

assertions.text: Agent reads the bug spec from ai/features/ to understand what was broken
Agent does NOT read source code to verify the fix
Agent tests the specific behavior that was reported broken
Agent also tests related flows that could have been affected
Clear pass/fail verdict on whether the bug is actually fixed from user perspective

evals.expected_output: Telegram bot testing with real message exchange

assertions.text: Agent checks if telethon is installed before proceeding
Agent sends actual messages/commands to the bot
Agent verifies bot responses match expected behavior
Agent asks for API credentials if not available
Tests invalid commands and unexpected input to bot

evals.prompt: /qa проверь что кнопка 'Создать кампанию' работает на https://app.example.com
evals.expected_output: Web testing with Playwright, focused on specific UI element

assertions.text: Agent loads Playwright MCP tools via ToolSearch
Agent navigates to the URL and takes snapshot
Agent clicks the specified button and verifies result
Agent takes screenshot if something fails
Agent fills in required form fields as a user would

evals.expected_output: CLI testing with bash, checking exit codes and output

assertions.text: Agent executes the CLI command via Bash
Agent checks exit code (0 = success)
Agent verifies stdout/stderr content
Agent tests --help or invalid args for error handling
Report follows the standard QA report template

evals.prompt: /qa full regression — проверь все основные пользовательские флоу
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive testing across multiple feature areas

assertions.text: Agent discovers available features by probing the product, not reading code
Tests cover at least 3 different feature areas
Each failure has severity (Critical/Major/Minor/Cosmetic)
Agent offers to create /spark specs for found bugs
Report has Summary table, Failures section, Passed section
